title: AutoCount CloudAccounting
description: Browser‑based AutoCount CloudAccounting with e‑Invoice, AI SmartScan, bank connection, and anytime access.

pricing: Lite: Monthly RM70, 12 months RM294, 24 months RM420
Basic: Monthly RM100, 12 months RM420, 24 months RM600
Plus: Monthly RM140, 12 months RM588, 24 months RM840
Pro: Monthly RM180, 12 months RM756, 24 months RM1080
Accountant: Monthly RM10, 12 months RM120, 24 months RM240

features: Support SST Treatment for Rental and Leasing Services
fixes: Fix hitting “Value was either too large or too small for an Int64” error when create Consolidated e-Invoice
Fix object reference error at Journal Entry Listing Report
Fix object reference error when copy from Payment Voucher at Self-Bill
Fix database timeout error in Bank Transactions
Fix object reference error when save Stock Opening Balance
Fix database timeout error in Invoice Listing Report
Fix database timeout error in Sales Price History
highlights: 1. Support SST Treatment for Rental and Leasing Services
A new SST tax code SVR-6 has been introduced to support 6% Service Tax for Rental or Leasing Services, with 2% service tax exemption based on the latest SST treatment.
This enhancement ensures correct invoice display, SST reporting, and e-Invoice submission mapping.
A new tax code SVR-6 has been introduced in Tax Code Maintenance > Configure Malaysia SST > Output Tax.
When using the SVR-6 tax code, the invoice will continue to display 6% SST at both the invoice line level and invoice summary.
System will automatically calculate the 2% exempted service tax amount and make it available as a new field that can be displayed on the invoice.

sections.heading: Four advantages
body: Capture, upload and extract data with AI SmartScan.

sections.heading: Training
body: Learn AutoCount CloudAccounting in Just 30 Minutes with the official tutorial video.

sections.heading: Latest release note summary
body: 1.1.80 Release 80 Date: 2026-03-10 Features: Support SST Treatment for Rental and Leasing Services Fixes: Fix hitting “Value was either too large or too small for an Int64” error when create Consolidated e-Invoice; Fix object reference error at Journal Entry Listing Report; Fix object reference error when copy from Payment Voucher at Self-Bill; Fix database timeout error in Bank Transactions; Fix object reference error when save Stock Opening Balance; Fix database timeout error in Invoice Listing Report; Fix database timeout error in Sales Price History Highlights: 1. Support SST Treatment for Rental and Leasing Services; A new SST tax code SVR-6 has been introduced to support 6% Service Tax for Rental or Leasing Services, with 2% service tax exemption based on the latest SST treatment.; This enhancement ensures correct invoice display, SST reporting, and e-Invoice submission mapping.; 1.1 Added New Tax Code SVR-6; A new tax code SVR-6 has been introduced in Tax Code Maintenance > Configure Malaysia SST > Output Tax.; 1.2 Invoice Display Enhancement; When using the SVR-6 tax code, the invoice will continue to display 6% SST at both the invoice line level and invoice summary.; System will automatically calculate the 2% exempted service tax amount and make it available as a new field that can be displayed on the invoice. Source: https://help.accounting.autocountcloud.com/support/discussions/topics/69000713314
